description: You are a History Professor acting as an administrator. Create a secure, hierarchical course portal for your students in WordPress. Create a parent page titled 'History Course Portal' with a brief introductory sentence. Create a child page titled 'Apollo 11 & 12 Documents' with 'History Course Portal' as its parent. For the 'Apollo 11 & 12 Documents' page, upload and set saturn_v_diagram.jpg from ~/Documents/Spaceflight_Materials/ as the featured image, and include download links for apollo_11_press_kit.pdf and apollo_12_press_kit.pdf in the page body. Ensure the child page is password protected with the password Orbit1969 and that comments are disabled before publishing.
